name: Leshrac
description: Imbalance demands it. Leshrac, the Tormented Soul Leshrac, Tormented Soul, is an entity torn from the heart of nature, a liminal being that exists half in one plane of existence, half in another. His penetrating intelligence is such that he can never ignore for a moment the agonizing horror at the heart of all creation.

abilities.name: Defilement
abilities.description: Grants self flat bonus area-of-effect per current.

abilities.name: Split Earth
abilities.description: Deals damage and stuns enemy units for a short duration within the area-targeted location.

abilities.name: Diabolic Edict
abilities.description: Deals pure damage within the radius. The lesser the enemy units, the more the damage dealt to those units.

abilities.name: Lightning Storm
abilities.description: Summons a lightning storm that damages the unit-targeted enemy, then jumps to nearby enemy units. Applies a movement speed slow to all affected enemy units. Lightning Storm Slow.

abilities.name: Nihilism
abilities.description: Grants Leshrac bonus movement speed while active, without reducing his magic resistance. When it serves his purpose, Leshrac briefly reduces his presence in the Terrene Plane.

abilities.name: Pulse Nova
abilities.description: Deals damage per second within the radius centered around Leshrac once toggled on. Drains Leshrac's mana per second toggled on.
